title: frumentum junceum
intro: Frumentum junceum, also known as Japanese rice grass or wild rice, is a type of perennial grass native to East Asia. This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of frumentum junceum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, aid in weight loss, and improve blood sugar control. Frumentum junceum is commonly prepared as an herbal tea or decoction by boiling the roots and stems in water, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds.
